notes.content: Module 1 (replace placeholder): Webhooks → Custom webhook. After saving, Make assigns a unique webhook URL. Copy URL → GitHub repo Settings → Webhooks → Add webhook → Payload URL = Make webhook URL, Content type = application/json, Events = Pull requests.

Module 2 (replace placeholder): Add flow filter. Condition: {{1.action}} == 'closed' AND {{1.pull_request.merged}} == true AND ({{1.pull_request.head.ref}} starts with 'agent/' OR {{1.pull_request.head.ref}} starts with 'agent-team/')
Module 3 (replace placeholder): GitHub → Get a pull request diff. Owner: Spookybro55, repo: autosmartweby, pull_number: {{1.pull_request.number}}.

Module 4 (replace placeholder): Anthropic → Create a Message. Model: claude-sonnet-4-6, max_tokens: 1500. System prompt: "You analyze a merged PR diff from project Autosmartweby. Extract: (1) PATTERN — reusable approach worth documenting. (2) GOTCHA — non-obvious pitfall. (3) REGRESSION — risk note. 1-3 sentences each. Return JSON {pattern, gotcha, regression, references}. Use null if not applicable." User prompt: PR title + body + diff (truncate at 8000 chars).
Module 5 (replace placeholder): Tools → Parse JSON. Input: {{4.content[0].text}}. Outputs structure: {pattern, gotcha, regression, references}.

Module 6 (replace placeholder): GitHub → Update a file. Path: docs/agents/PATTERNS.md, branch: main, commit_message: "chore(agents): learning loop — pattern from PR #{{1.pull_request.number}}". Append content between markers <!-- learning-loop-marker: PATTERN-AUTO-START --> and <!-- learning-loop-marker: PATTERN-AUTO-END -->. Add 2 more parallel branches for GOTCHAS.md and REGRESSION-LOG.md (use Make's Router to fan out from module 5).

Trigger: Webhook (instant=true). No cron schedule.

Cost: ~$0.05 per merged agent PR (Anthropic Sonnet 4.6 ~1500 tokens).

Ops/měs: ~60 (1 per merged agent PR × 60 PRs target).

Cost cap recommended: Anthropic Console → Billing → Spend caps → Monthly $20, Daily $2.
